commentary: Fifteen years ago this October, I walked into Bluff City Medical Center as a new chaplain and had no idea what I was doing. All I knew was that I was supposed to show up. Fifteen years later, that's still the whole job. Show up. Be present. Let the work teach you. To my team - thank you for carrying this ministry with me. #Chaplaincy #PastoralCare #Memphis

This Saturday on Morning Reflections: we're talking about grief that doesn't follow a timetable. Not the tidy five stages - the kind that shows up uninvited at the grocery store. Join me 7-9 AM on WGSP 1490 AM or stream online. Bring your coffee. #MorningReflections #WGSP #Memphis #Faith
This Saturday: @RebeccaPrice hosts an extended conversation on faith and resilience with a special guest. Tune in to WGSP 1490 AM, 7-9 AM. Stream at wgsp1490.com. #WGSP #MorningReflections #Memphis

Proud to announce that our Pastoral Care team at Bluff City Medical Center has been recognized by the Association of Professional Chaplains for excellence in CPE supervision. This work matters. #Chaplaincy #PastoralCare #APC

Compassion fatigue is real. If you work in a helping profession - nursing, social work, chaplaincy, counseling - please hear me: you cannot pour from an empty vessel. Build in the rest before you need it desperately. Your people need you well. #CompassionFatigue #HelperSupport #Chaplaincy

Had a beautiful peer consultation with colleagues across Memphis this week. Chaplaincy work can be isolating - we need each other. Grateful for this community. #HospitalChaplaincy #PeerSupport #Memphis

The Grace Community Church Community Health Fair is happening October 3rd! Free screenings, wellness resources, and community. A big thank you to Deacon Charles Mosley for organizing again this year. Come out, Memphis. #HealthFair #GraceCommunityChruch #Memphis #CommunityHealth

WGSP 1490 AM is growing! We just crossed 10,000 weekly listeners. None of this happens without our incredible hosts. Shoutout to Rebecca Price for making Saturday mornings something people look forward to. #WGSP #Memphis #CommunityRadio

Board Certified Chaplains do not just offer prayer - we provide structured spiritual assessment, crisis support, and collaborative care as part of interdisciplinary teams. CPE-trained. Clinically competent. Spiritually grounded. If your hospital is still treating chaplaincy as an afterthought, let's talk. #BoardCertifiedChaplain #APC #ClinicalPastoralEducation

Nurses deal with grief constantly and rarely have space to process it. So grateful for colleagues like Rebecca Price who remind us that caregivers need care too. Come to the health fair! #NursingLife #CompassionFatigue #Memphis

Seven years of Morning Reflections this month. When I started in 2019 I thought it would be a small community outreach project. It became something much bigger than me. Thank you to TJ Jackson and the whole WGSP family. Thank you, listeners. This show belongs to all of us. #MorningReflections #WGSP7Years #Memphis

We are blessed to have Rebecca Price as part of the Grace Community family - not just as a member but as a minister of the Word. Her gift is creating sacred space wherever she goes. Looking forward to her Advent meditation this year. #GraceCommunityChurch #Memphis #Faith

Happy to be a panelist at the West Tennessee Chaplaincy Network fall gathering next week. Topic: boundaries in pastoral care - how do you stay present without losing yourself? If you're a chaplain or CPE student in the region, come find me. #Chaplaincy #WestTennessee #BoundariesInCare

Our Pastoral Care team is hiring! Bluff City Medical Center is seeking a Staff Chaplain to join our interdisciplinary care team. Board certification (or eligibility) required. Memphis-based, full-time. Learn more on our careers page.

A listener sent me a note this week that stopped me cold. She said Morning Reflections got her through her husband's hospitalization. She listened from the hospital parking lot before going inside each morning. That is why we do this work. That is the whole thing. #MorningReflections #WGSP #Gratitude

Planning is underway for the Grace Community Church Community Health Fair on October 3rd. We'll have blood pressure checks, diabetes screenings, and information tables. All are welcome. Rebecca Price will be emceeing - you know it will be good! #HealthFair #Memphis #GraceCommunity
